Dialog.name: SYS_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In New Game+, you can carry over some content from your clear data to your new game.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Content carried over into the new game is as follows (note that {f 0 1 2}items in red will always carry over{f 0 1 27}):[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}- Stats[n]- Social Stats[n]- Protagonist level[n]- Protagonist HP/SP gains outside of leveling[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}- Teammate stat boosts from Incense[n]- Teammate HP/SP gains outside of leveling[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}- Twilight Fragments[n]- {f 0 1 2}All costumes besides SEES uniforms{f 0 1 27}[n]- {f 0 1 2}Some souvenirs received from characters{f 0 1 27}[n]- Items received from characters for unlocking Personas[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Starting new game with clear data carried over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Clear data will not be carried over. Will you proceed?[n]{f 1 4 1}{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Starting new game without carrying over clear data.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In {f 0 1 2}Merciless{f 0 1 27} difficulty, only the following content is carried over:[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}- {f 0 1 2}All costumes besides SEES uniforms{f 0 1 27}[n]- {f 0 1 2}Some souvenirs received from characters{f 0 1 27}[n]- {f 0 1 2}Play time{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 1 1}
